items.title: JPMorgan 2026 Investment Outlook: Early-Year Growth and Inflation Acceleration Expected
items.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management projects both economic growth and inflation will accelerate in early 2026 due to OBBBA impacts, with subsequent moderation. Report emphasizes quality-focused investing and secular themes including AI ecosystem expansion.
items.domain_relevance: Macro outlook signals early-2026 inflation and growth acceleration with policy implications

items.title: Goldman Sachs 2026 Investment Outlook: Critical Resources Gain Strategic Importance
items.summary: Goldman Sachs identifies critical resources including energy and raw materials as gaining heightened strategic importance in 2026, with noted vulnerabilities in supply chains.
items.domain_relevance: Strategic commodity and energy market signals affecting global macro stability
